zh.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯
zh.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry於大約1176年出生在法國崔傑貝里。她於大約1210年與Guy III de Limoges結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年8月18日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年88歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安索利納可。

zh-hans.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: 法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry于大约1176年出生在法国崔傑貝里。她于大约1210年与Guy III de Limoges结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年8月18日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年88岁，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安索利納可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Barr
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow) and northern Irish (Ulster): habitational name from any of various places in southwestern Scotland, in particular Ayrshire and Renfrewshire, named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’ or a Brittonic cognate of this.

English and Welsh: habitational name from Great Barr in Staffordshire. This is from Brittonic barro- ‘top, summit’, referring to Barr Beacon; there is evidence that this was known as la Bare in the 13th century.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Barre-en-Ouche in Eure, France, or perhaps from Barre-de-Semilly in Manche, France.

variants.name: Barrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus): habitational name from Barry in Angus or from another place so named, generally named with Gaelic barr ‘height, hill’, or from a British cognate of this word. This name is also the Scottish form of Barry .
French (Barrié): variant of Barrier .
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

variants.name: Berry
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Dubarry
meanings: French: variant of the topographic or habitational name Barry , with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’.

variants.name: Baril
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Normand, Alain, Armand, Ghislaine, Jacques, Jean-Marc, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Monique, Phillippe.
French: from Old French baril ‘barrel’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a cooper, or a nickname for a rotund man. Compare Barry 7 and Berry 7.

History: Jean Baril from the Saintonge region of France was in QC by 1673, when he married Marie Guillet, the first of his three wives. He died in 1724 in Batiscan, QC. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Barrie, Bar(r)y, and Berry.

variants.name: Bary
meanings: Walloon and northern French: variant of   Barry   8.
French (southern): rare variant of   Barry   6.
Altered form of French   Baril  . Compare   Barry   7.

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from erm(en) ‘whole, entire’ + gard ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Irmengard
meanings: Variant of   Ermengard .

variants.name: Irmingard
meanings: from erm(en) ‘whole, entire’ + gard ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Ermgard
meanings: from erm(en) ‘whole, entire’ + gard ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Irmgard
meanings: from erm(en) ‘whole, entire’ + gard ‘enclosure’.

en.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry was born about 1176, in Berry, Cher, Centre, France. She married Guy III de Limoges about 1210. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 August 1263, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 88, and was buried in Solignac, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry est née environ 1176, à Berry, Cher, Centre, France. Elle a épousé Guy III de Limoges environ 1210. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 août 1263, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Solignac, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry wurde um 1176 in Berry, Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat um 1210 Guy III de Limoges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. August 1263 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Solignac, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry è nata il circa 1176 nel Berry, Cher, Centre, Francia. Lei sposato Guy III de Limoges circa 1210. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 agosto 1263, nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Solignac, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.Brantôme, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France: フランスアクイティアインドールドグンブラントoメ
ja.Berry, Cher, Centre, France: フランスセントアチャーバーリー
ja.Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitain: フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズ
ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barryは約1176年にフランスセントアチャーバーリーで生まれた。約1210年にGuy III de Limogesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年8月18日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで88歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンソリグナックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry(은)는 대략 1176년 프랑스 세트르 처 베리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 Guy III de Limoges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 8월 18일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 솔익나크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry nasceu aproximadamente 1176, em Berry, Cher, Centre, França. Ela casou-se com Guy III de Limoges aproximadamente 1210. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1263, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Solignac, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry родилась около 1176 г. в местности бирри, чир, кентр, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy III de Limoges около 1210 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 августа 1263 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности солигнак, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

sm.du 1230 au 1238: mai le 1230 e o'o I le 1238

es.lifeSummary: Ermengarde de Barry nació aproximadamente 1176, en Berry, Cher, Centre, Francia. Se casó con Guy III de Limoges aproximadamente 1210. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1263, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Solignac, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
